name: QA 915
description:
PCP QA Test No. 915

Test local daemon access override settings in PCP_SYSCONFIG_DIR



Copyright (c) 2015 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform debian11 reproduce
